Welcome to Kids N Clan 

Where Healthy Smiles Begin

At Kids N Clan, we’re more than just a dental clinic. We’re a trusted partner in your family’s health journey, offering gentle, expert care for both kids and adults. Our mission is to create happy smiles while ensuring every visit is a positive experience.

​

See More

Our Services

Our Dedicated Team

Dr. Ruchi Gupta

BDS, MDS

Paediatric Dentistry

Fellowship NFPM

PALS, American Heart Association

Dentist - 16 years of experience

Paediatric Dentist with special training in treatment of Special Children, Paediatric emergencies, Root canal treatments and Laser Surgeries.

Dr. Abhishek Nagaraj

BDS, MDS

Prosthodontics & Implantology,

Fellowship Kidwai Oncology Hospital,

Mastership Implant Prosthetics ICOI

Dentist - 17 years of experience

Specialist dentist for Adults and Older patients with background in Oncology , Dental Implants, Smile Correction and Digital Dentures.

All types of pediatric crowns restore damaged tooth structure with resin-veneered, zirconia/ceramic, stainless steel, composite strip, and polycarbonate options.

Kids Crowns

Quick, single-visit custom Denovo Pediatric Space Maintainers manage space issues caused by premature baby tooth loss.

Space Maintainers

A single-visit, painless dental laser procedure corrects abnormal tongue attachment without sutures.

Tongue Tie Treatment

Dental implants are used to replace missing root structures and restore single or multiple missing teeth with implant-supported crowns, bridges, or fixed/removable dentures.

Implant Dentistry

Braces and aligners are procedures to straighten teeth, correct bite issues, and shift teeth to proper positioning as needed.

Braces & Aligners

Root canal treatment is performed to relieve dental pain, save your teeth, and can involve a single or multiple-visit procedure based on the tooth's condition using modern technology.

Root Canal Treatment

What Our Patients Are Saying

Hospital dentistry offers single-day complete mouth rehabilitations for very young or uncooperative children.

Treatment Under GA

Dentistry services for infants, kids, teens, and children with special needs, ranging from establishing a dental home to treating oral diseases.

Comprehensive

Safe and comfortable nitrous oxide conscious sedation helps patients of all ages relax during procedures.

Sedation

Pain-free, advanced technology ensures comfortable, worry-free treatments with faster healing for kids and adults.

Dental Lasers 

Same-day appointments for sudden pain, trauma, or dental injuries ensure prompt care.

Emergency

Digital dentistry uses advanced tools like digital scanners and 3D printers to design and create precise crowns, veneers, dentures, and more with efficiency and innovation.

Digital Dentistry
